data.title: Write unit tests for competing-branch tiebreak cascade selection logic
data.description:
## Story
7de2-f557 — Competing branch tiebreak

## testing_mode
RED

## What
Create `tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-tiebreak.sh` with structural boundary tests for tiebreak cascade instructions added to sprint/SKILL.md and fix-bug/SKILL.md resume scan sections:

1. test_sprint_resume_tiebreak_has_cascade: grep for 'tiebreak' in sprint/SKILL.md WORKTREE_TRACKING resume scan block
2. test_sprint_resume_tiebreak_mentions_criterion_count: grep for 'criterion' or 'task-list' or 'acceptance' in tiebreak section
3. test_sprint_resume_tiebreak_mentions_test_gate: grep for 'test-gate' in tiebreak section  
4. test_sprint_resume_tiebreak_mentions_timestamp: grep for 'timestamp' as fallback in tiebreak section
5. test_fix_bug_tiebreak_mirrors_sprint: grep for 'tiebreak' in fix-bug/SKILL.md resume scan section

Add .test-index entries:
```
plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-tiebreak.sh
plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-tiebreak.sh
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] New test file exists at tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-tiebreak.sh and is executable
- [ ] All 5 tests run and fail RED
- [ ] .test-index entries added for both SKILL.md files
